title: Rekoto ya ditiro tsa go baakanya (Molawana 30 GDPR)
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
f360f62f1957599adbb383a243c6d52a
ntl_noulm_enxx_2024q2.md
updated: E tlhabolotswe: Phukwi 2026. Rekoto eno e kwala ditiro tsa go dira tshedimosetso ya motho ka namana kwa Wedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Maina a banyalani, letlha, lefelo, setlhogo, dinepe, mmino, menyu, dikarolo
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row1Purpose: Tlhama o bo o itebaganye taletso ya lenyalo
row1Retention: Fa akhaonto e ntse e dira
row1Recipients: Leru la Google (Lebenkele la Molelo, go amogela)
row2Data: Leina la moeng, go nna teng (ee/nnyaa), go tlhopha menyu, dialeji, tshedimosetso ya boitekanelo
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row2Purpose: Laola lenaane la baeng le menyu
row2Retention: Dikgwedi di le 12 morago ga tiragalo
row3Data: Dinepe tsa lenyalo (tse di tsenngwang mo khoutung ya AES-256-GCM)
row3Retention: Dikgwedi di le 12 morago ga tiragalo
row3Recipients: Leru la Google (Kokoanyopotlana ya Lebenkele la Molelo)
row4Data: Letshwao la nako, leinatiriso la motsamaisi
row4Basis: Morokotso o o mo molaong (Molawana 6.1.f GDPR)
row4Purpose: Laola phitlhelelo ya phanele ya botsamaisi
Control access to the admin panel
row4Recipients: Leru la Google (Dithulaganyo tsa Lebenkele la Molelo)
row5Data: Ditiro tsa Superadmin, dithokene tse di dirisitsweng, ditaletso tse di phimotsweng
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
row5Recipients: Leru la Google (Pego ya boruni jwa Lebenkele la Molelo)
internationalText: Tshedimosetso e bolokwa mo disefareng tsa Google Cloud mo kgaolong ya eur3 (Frankfurt, Jeremane).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
scc: Dipolelwana tsa Konteraka tse di Tlwaelegileng (SCC) - Tshwetso ya go Tsenya Tirisong ya 2021/914
dpf: Letlhomeso la Polokodiphiri ya Tshedimosetso (DPF) EU-US, UK-US le Switzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measuresTitle: Dikgato tsa setegeniki le tsa thulaganyo
measureEncryption: AES-256-GCM go tsenya ditshwantsho le tshedimosetso e e botlhokwa (PBKDF2)
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: Kgolaganyo ya HTTPS (TLS 1.3) mo polatefomong yotlhe
HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureFirestore: Melao ya tshireletso ya Firestore (taolo ya phitlhelelo e e theilweng mo thulaganyong)
measureStorage: Polokelo e nnye ya selegae ka tumelelo fela
Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Pholisi ya go boloka tshedimosetso: dikgwedi di le 12 morago ga tiragalo ya tshedimosetso ya moeng
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: Superadmin e sireleditswe ke Netefatso ya Firebase + tsela e e fitlhegileng
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

golden: Elegant le khanyang, le accents khauta.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Tlhaho le sober le botala bo bonolo.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Bothitho le boreledi, le pinki hues.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Lesedi le go sa tseye letlhakore, ka go nna teng go go didimetseng le go go sa feleng.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Bonolo le lerato, le perela pinki medumo.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: E foreshe e bile e ritibetse, e na le mebala ya lavender le mauve.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: E khanyang ebile e le ya mokete, e nang le diphatsimo tse futhumetseng tsa gauta.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Lefifi le makhethe, le dintlhakgolo tsa amber le gauta.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: E tseneletse e bile e raraane, e na le gauta e e tseneletseng mo lemoragong le lentsho.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Botala jo bo lefifi thata ka gauta e e tseneletseng le go nna teng ga masisi.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: E bothitho ebile e apesa, ka veine e khibidu le diphatsimo tsa gauta.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Botala jo bo tseneletseng jo bo nang le ditlhaka tsa selefera le go nna teng ga serene.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Botala jo bo tseneletseng jwa tlholego jo bo nang le mebala ya gauta le e e maphatsiphatsi.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Intense pherese le pinki le lerato sparkles.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Mokete wa lerato le fapaneng ka mebala ya molalatladi.
Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Botala jwa loapi, pinki le bosweu go tlotla folaga ya trans.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Serolwana, bosweu, phepole le bontsho jwa folaga e e seng ya bobedi.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Mmala wa lamunu, o mosweu le o pinki wa folaga ya lesbian.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Pinki, pherese le botala jwa loapi jwa folaga ya bi.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Pinki, mosehla le putswa ya folaga ya pane.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Ntsho, boputswa, bosweu le pherese ya folaga ya asexual.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
